title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 361.520 - Director to list claims duly presented
text:
361.520.  Director to list claims duly presented. — The director shall make a complete list of all claims duly presented, and shall specify therein the name of the claimant, the nature of the claim, and the amount thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 7929, A.L. 2000 S.B. 896, A.L. 2019 S.B. 179) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5334; 1919 § 11717
